scripts.db:init: bun --cwd packages/db drizzle-kit push --config drizzle.config.ts && bun --cwd packages/db scripts/seed-user.ts
scripts.build: bun run scripts/check-workspace.ts build && turbo run build
scripts.lint: bun run scripts/check-workspace.ts lint && biome check .
scripts.format: bun run scripts/check-workspace.ts format && biome format . --write
scripts.typecheck: bun run scripts/check-workspace.ts typecheck && turbo run typecheck
